author: doll-agent
content: Scope expansion: ferrolearn-kernel actually owns the gaussian_process estimators (per recent commit 8fde2b4 'complete GP classifier'). Add to scope: GaussianProcessRegressor, GaussianProcessClassifier, kernel functions (RBF, Matern, RationalQuadratic, ExpSineSquared, ConstantKernel, WhiteKernel, DotProduct, kernel composition with + * **). Originally was just kernel_approximation + kernel_ridge + KernelCenterer.
